title: Republicans who endorse Kamala Harris for President
shortDescription: Hundreds of Republican politicians have crossed party lines to endorse Democratic Presidential nominee Vice President Kamala Harris.

title: January 6th gala to be held at Trump golf club
shortDescription: Former president Donald Trump's campaign says he will not attend a fundraising gala for January 6 defendants, which will be held at a Trump golf club.

title: Donald Trump adds Robert F. Kennedy Jr., Tulsi Gabbard to transition team
shortDescription: Tulsi Gabbard and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. endorsed Donald Trump over the last week. Now the former Democrats are joining his transition team.

title: Texas judge blocks Biden's citizenship program for immigrant spouses
shortDescription: A federal judge in Texas temporarily blocked a Biden administration program that would grant legal status to immigrant spouses of U.S. citizens.

title: 'Closer to World War III' than ever, Trump says in Michigan speech
shortDescription: Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump spoke to a crowd of National Guard officers in Michigan on Monday.

title: Latino civil rights group demands investigation into Ken Paxton voter fraud chase
shortDescription: Lidia Martinez, an 87-year-old retired teacher, said she opened her door at 6 a.m. to find nine officers seeking info on her voter registration work.

title: H.R. McMaster says he would not be part of a second Trump White House
shortDescription: Former National Security Adviser H.R. McMaster says he would not join a second Trump administration.

title: Trump is using the '2020 playbook' again, will say election is rigged
shortDescription: Former Trump White House national security advisor warns the GOP nominee is planning to claim the election was rigged - again.

title: DOJ fights to prosecute Trump
shortDescription: Justice Department special counsel Jack Smith urged a federal appeals court to reopen the classified documents case against former president Trump.

title: How these NC Native American voters became staunch Trump supporters
shortDescription: This county, home to the largest Native American tribe in North Carolina, voted blue until 2016. Voters share why they became Trump supporters.

title: Former Democrat Tulsi Gabbard endorses Trump for president
shortDescription: On the third anniversary of the bombing in Afghanistan, killing 13 U.S. service members, Gabbard, a National Guard veteran, endorsed Trump.

title: Swing state election board sued by county officials over new rules
shortDescription: The Georgia State Election Board is being sued by county officials and Democrats to "prevent chaos" from Trump-approved board members' new rules.

title: Trump prosecutor urges appeals court to revive classified docs charges
shortDescription: Justice Department special counsel Jack Smith urged an appeals court to reinstate charges against Donald Trump by arguing he was appointed correctly.

title: Why is Trump buying TV ads in Florida?
shortDescription: The Trump campaign bought $48,000 in ads in the West Palm Beach media market - where the former president lives.

title: Trump lays wreaths at Arlington Cemetery, 3 years after ISIS attack
shortDescription: Donald Trump appeared at the Arlington National Cemetery to commemorate soldiers killed in the Abbey Gate terrorist attack. He bashed Kamala Harris.

title: Trump pushes back on agreed-upon debate
shortDescription: Donald Trump is pushing back on the agreed-upon ABC presidential debate because Kamala Harris has a personal friendship with a network executive.

title: Harris tries evading Trump on Afghanistan anniversary
shortDescription: On its third anniversary, former President Trump tied Kamala Harris to the botched Afghanistan withdrawal.
